title: Simply Superior
description:
An optimization modpack that aimes for optimisation and has unreal looking shaders
withouth changing the game.
body:
An optimisation modpack that is **CLIENT SIDE**.
It has shaders, even useable on a potato pc, using the best optimization mods possible!
The modpack doesnt change gamemechanics and doesnt change too much the experience while making it better!


**Enjoy!**

Check Out My Other Projects Too!

FPV Elytra :https://modrinth.com/modpack/fpv-elytra

Simple Vanilla + :https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-vanilla-+
